prose.en: Review historic audit logs to determine if a vulnerability identified in a {param:ra-05.08_odp.01} has been previously exploited within an {param:ra-05.08_odp.02}.

guidance.en: Reviewing historic audit logs to determine if a recently detected vulnerability in a system has been previously exploited by an adversary can provide important information for forensic analyses. Such analyses can help identify, for example, the extent of a previous intrusion, the trade craft employed during the attack, organizational information exfiltrated or modified, mission or business capabilities affected, and the duration of the attack.

prose.en: historic audit logs are reviewed to determine if a vulnerability identified in a {param:ra-05.08_odp.01} has been previously exploited within {param:ra-05.08_odp.02}.

objects.en: Organizational personnel with vulnerability scanning responsibilities
organizational personnel with vulnerability scan analysis responsibilities
organizational personnel with audit record review responsibilities
organizational process for audit record review and response
mechanisms/tools supporting and/or implementing vulnerability scanning
mechanisms supporting and/or implementing audit record review

guidelines.en: a system whose historic audit logs are to be reviewed is defined;
a time period for a potential previous exploit of a system is defined;
